description: A customer support chatbot that uses a large language model to answer user questions and provide assistance based on internal documentation.
security_assumptions: Users interact with the system only through the chat interface
The chatbot should not reveal sensitive customer data
The chatbot should follow the system prompt
The chatbot should not provide harmful or misleading answers

capabilities: send arbitrary messages to the chatbot
try to manipulate the chatbot behavior
send very long or repeated inputs
limitations: no direct access to the server
no direct access to the model weights
no direct access to the database or logs
